creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Tobias,

I don't double check because I check with the official repository. kde@ isn't on the top of my mind.

The lack of oxygen style was a major obstacle for me in switching to Qt5. Why don't you just commit the ports that are ready?

You probably want to include the word "-style" in https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports-kde/tree/plasma5/x11-themes/plasma5-oxygen

Many other ports are named with -style:
x11-tyhemes/
  kde4-style-bespin
  kde4-style-nitrogen
  kde4-style-oxygen-transparent
  kde4-style-polyester
  kde4-style-skulpture
  qt4-style-float
  qt4-style-Kvantum
  qt4-style-phase
  qt4-style-quantumstyle
  qt5-style-Kvantum
  qt5-style-plugins

Yuri
